feedback: The faculty explains concepts very clearly and the lectures are engaging. I love this course!
Lab equipment is broken half the time and we can't complete our practicals. Very frustrating.
The WiFi on campus is extremely slow and disconnects constantly during online exams, causing a lot of stress.
asdfghjkl qwerty zxcvbnm random text here nothing useful
Placement support has been excellent. The career cell helped me land a great internship at a top company.
The curriculum feels outdated. We are not learning industry-relevant skills and the syllabus hasn't been updated in years.
The canteen food is decent and the hostel facilities are satisfactory. Campus life is okay overall.
BEST COLLEGE EVER!!!! 10/10 EVERYTHING IS PERFECT NO COMPLAINTS AT ALL LOVE IT
The professor rushes through topics without checking if students understand. More interaction in class would help greatly.
Library resources are well-maintained and the staff is very helpful when we need research materials.
The internship guidance provided by the placement cell was mediocre. They could do a lot better with mock interviews.
Assignments are relevant and tests are fair. The grading system is transparent and I appreciate the feedback from professors.
The sports facilities and extracurricular activities are excellent. The annual fest was very well organized this year.
